mastery_age.title: Trigger the Phase 17 Mastery Age — the quantum_mechanism crafting activates the final History Stages transition

subtitle.text: All 5 steps. The mechanism is built. The age transition fires. Everything left in the pack unlocks.

description: CH.17 · QUANTUM MECHANISM COMPLETE
▸ The 5-step chain is complete.
Step 1: Redstone Pearl.
Step 2: Quantum Fluid.
Step 3: Quantum Casing.
Step 4: Advanced Quantum Component.
Step 5: Quantum Mechanism.
The mechanism is in your inventory.',
The Phase 17 Mastery Age transition fires when you craft it.',
Every remaining age-locked recipe in the pack unlocks.',
Check JEI immediately.',
◈ WHAT THE MASTERY AGE UNLOCKS
└ History Stages final age: all remaining age-locked content
└ New recipes visible in JEI after transition notification
└ Divine/PTD final recipes: Stone-dependent endgame synthesis
└ Create Oppenheimered: any remaining nuclear chain recipes
└ Celestisynth: any age-gated final tier variants
└ ISS T.O. Magic (traveloptics:): Abyssal Beam may require this age
└ Check KubeJS age_lock.js for full Mastery age list
◈ INSTALLING THE QUANTUM MECHANISM
└ Place mechanism in the Create Teleporter block
(the teleporter needs the mechanism as its core component)',
└ Register locations: right-click teleporter to set destination',
name each destination for network clarity',
(Home, End Base, Village, Farm Hub, Nuclear Site)',
└ Fuel: Quantum Fluid in connected Fluid Tank
└ Power: Rotational Force from Create SU network
(teleporter needs SU to activate — connect to main grid)
◈ TELEPORTER NETWORK DESIGN
└ Hub-and-spoke: one central teleporter + multiple spokes',
└ Or: point-to-point with linked pairs',
└ Recommended locations: base, End portal, Ch13 farm hub,
nuclear test site, coastal outpost',
└ Network naming: consistent naming convention makes navigation clean
▸ You built a teleporter.',
The first civilization that tried this dimension
had foot travel only.',
The second had horses.',
The third built roads.',
You built roads, Elytra, ships,',
and a quantum teleporter network.',
That is not the same problem they had.',
You changed the nature of distance.',
▶ Craft the Quantum Mechanism [collect]
▶ Trigger the Phase 17 Mastery Age [check]
◇ After the Mastery Age transition: check JEI for all new recipes.',
Open History Stages in chat (command or HUD) to confirm the age.',
The age notification appears in chat on transition.',
It will say something like: Phase 17 — Mastery Age.',
That notification is the confirmation.
